bugs.summary: Nested delete form inside team settings form causes accidental team deletion / Save Settings unreliable

legacy_team_2_pb_171.note: Verified in prior session; still valid for UAT Closed Team regression

notes.skipped_by_design: UAT-01-01/01-01b/01-02/01-03/01-03b (registration/email verification); UAT-07-01 (Django admin PIP finalize + Gmail).
notes.UAT-08-14: Invited newuser+uat14@example.com via manage Invite tab; activation link set is_active=True; login redirect with verified flash; new user logged in and accessed /teams/5/ (Request Pending). Note: auto-registered users have unusable password — must use Forgot password to set credentials.
notes.UAT-03-02-neg: Activity blank name now surfaces [data-testid="name-error"] with is-invalid; skill blank title shows title-error. Tested on disposable draft PB 241.
notes.UAT-03-05b: Visibility toggle used disposable PB 240; revert-to-private on released PB via service (Edit disabled when released). Delete modal cancel verified on PB 237.
notes.UAT-07-02: Spec expects 4 Activities; actual 3 after PIPs (Alpha, Beta, Gamma). v3.0 and Accepted PIPs verified in GUI.
notes.phase_e_f: Phases E–F completed in prior session; spot-verified PIPs list (3 PIPs) and PB237 Released v3.0 with history PIPs #13/#14.
notes.UAT-08-01: UAT Test Team created in browser (initial pk=4); recreated as pk=5 after accidental delete.
notes.UAT-08-07: Fixed nested delete form in manage.html (#141). Browser Save Settings now persists join_policy (Auto-approve → Requires Approval verified on team detail info card). Success message: 'Team settings saved.'
notes.UAT-08-08: Admin member redirected from /teams/5/manage/ to detail with permission message (client + prior browser join flow).
notes.UAT-08-09: Admin leave verified via POST action=leave; join button returns.
notes.UAT-08-11: UAT Delete Team (pk=6) deleted via manage POST action=delete_team.
notes.UAT-08-12: Admin member sees shared UAT Journey Playbook (237) on /playbooks/ after team share.
notes.UAT-08-13: Bell badge 3→2 after mark-read on Notification pk=4 ('Join request for UAT Test Team'); dropdown at /notifications/.
notes.UAT-08-15: Team member admin: global workflows/activities/artifacts lists return 200 with team playbook content.
